ddls:
CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the design belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "base_height" REAL /* Base height of the design */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the design */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the design */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the design */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth of the design */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail image of the design */,
  "bump_map" TEXT /* File path to the bump map image of the design */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the design */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance levels for the design */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity of the design */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the design */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the project in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the design */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., thumbnail, bump_map, 3D model) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the asset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the asset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the asset */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design version the asset belongs to */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the asset file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES design_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_assets_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the production run */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in the batch */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the items are stored */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory items (e.g., in stock, on hold, out of stock) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the inventory items */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the storage location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client placing the order */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "order_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_runs" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production run */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design being produced */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the production run */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items produced */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production run (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the production run */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the production run */,
  "production_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_production_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the design */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the design */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
